title: clinopodium frivaldszkyanum
intro: Clinopodium frivaldszkyanum, also known as Hungarian mint or mountain mint, is a perennial plant species belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It is native to the mountainous regions of Central Europe and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Clinopodium frivaldszkyanum include soothing digestive issues, relieving headaches and fever, and supporting respiratory health. Clinopodium frivaldszkyanum can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, making it a versatile remedy for various health concerns.
